subject: Cloud Computing
title: SaaS Pricing Models
description: A quick win: understand SaaS Pricing Models.

hook.text: Some SaaS charges per user. Some per feature. Some per usage. Some just say 'contact sales.'

buildup.text: Per-seat pricing charges for each user: $10 per person per month. Simple, predictable, scalable.

discovery.text: Usage-based pricing charges for what you consume: API calls, storage, messages. You pay as you grow.

twist.text: Freemium is the hook. Free for small teams, then prices spike once you're dependent on the tool.

climax.text: The best SaaS pricing aligns with customer value. The worst punishes growth with surprise bills.

punchline.text: Free tiers get you in. Enterprise tiers keep you paying.

quiz.question: What is the 'freemium' model in SaaS?
options: Free basic access that converts users to paid plans as they grow dependent
A model where all features are permanently free
Software that costs nothing but shows advertisements
